text: Handled my car accident case quickly and kept me updated every step of the way.
Great outcome, but I sometimes had to wait a day or two for a call back.
The attorney explained everything in plain language. I always felt like a priority.
Staff was kind and patient. They took over the insurance headache so I could focus on healing.
Good result but the intake process was confusing and I had to resend documents twice.
Attorney was excellent in negotiations. Front desk sometimes seemed rushed on the phone.
Clear, honest advice from day one. I never felt pressured into any decision.
They checked in on me regularly and remembered details about my injury and work situation.
Hard to get someone on the phone the first week. Once we connected, things improved.
They took my case seriously even though it wasn’t a huge claim. Very respectful team.
Settlement was higher than I expected. Only complaint is that emails could have been clearer.
They coordinated everything with the body shop and health providers. Very organized.
Appreciated the text message updates. One appointment was rescheduled last minute though.
Receptionist greeted me by name and the paralegal always followed up when she said she would.
Lawyer was knowledgeable but I felt rushed in a couple of meetings.
They explained pros and cons of every offer and let me decide without pressure.
Good experience overall. Parking and finding the office was a little confusing on my first visit.
Highly responsive on email. I always knew what the next step was.
Great result and kind staff. I did have to wait in the lobby for 30 minutes once.
They called me after hours to explain an offer so I didn’t worry all weekend.
Everything was handled professionally. I’d send any family member here.
Settlement took longer than I hoped, but they kept explaining the strategy.
They dealt with a very difficult adjuster and still got a fair outcome.
Good legal work but I got different answers depending on who answered the phone.
Appreciated the honesty about strengths and weaknesses of my case.
Everyone was friendly and respectful. They also checked in on my recovery, not just the case.
I mostly communicated by email and felt like they read everything carefully.
They handled the paperwork with my employer and made a stressful time much easier.
Took a week to get a call back after my first inquiry. Once the case started, it went smoothly.
They even called to explain what to expect at my IME appointment. Very thorough.
Overall very good. Sometimes voicemail box was full when I tried to leave a message.
Professional, compassionate, and effective. I always felt heard.
